description:
Cloud-based collaboration platform with real time status-sharing


There is a new version of the Trimble Connect for Windows application released today. Version identifier for this release is 1.25.3.660. The new version is available for download in the Connect apps store page or by clicking the "New version available!" button in the top right corner of the Connect for Windows application.

Improvements
- Introduced support for .VCL file format
- IFC (.IFC) file format importer updated to version 6.68
- LandXML (.XML) file format importer updated to version 1.28
- DWG (.DWG) file format importer updated to version 1.62
- DGN (.DGN) file format importer updated to version 1.45

Issue fixes
- Fixed an issue where the application crashed when opening a specific IFC model
- Fixed an issue with point cloud unit detection to correctly support feet as measurement unit by reading the WKT (Well-Known Text) header in the point cloud file
- Fixed an issue with file versions listing where the all file versions displayed were not matching the versions listed in the Connect for Browser.
- File format importer plugin installers are now digitally signed to ensure successful installation
- Fixed an issue where the application crashed when updating certain views
